turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Oh, hey there. Uh, I'm calling

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Esta llamada puede ser grabada para trabajos de calidad y entrenamiento. Para Español, oprima el 2.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Thanks for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Part of pretty good AI

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Am I speaking with Paul?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Uh, no, this is Eleanor. I'm just trying to set up my follow-up for my knee.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Please provide the full name and date of birth of the patient needing the follow-up appointment.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Sure, it's Eleanor Babcock, and my date of birth is February 2nd, 1944.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: What is your day of birth?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, it's February 2nd, 1944.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Thanks Eleanor

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Is this follow-up related to a recent visit or a specific concern you'd like to discuss?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: No problem.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, it’s about my knee after the last appointment. It’s been acting up again.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Do you have a preferred provider for your follow-up or would you like the first available appointment?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Um, I don’t remember the name, maybe just the first available would be easiest.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: The first available slot is Tuesday, June 30th at 4 p.m. with Doogie Houser.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Would you like to book that appointment?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Oh,

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Uh, could you tell me if there’s anything earlier in the day?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Alright,

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: The only available time on Tuesday, June 30th is 4 p.m.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Would you like to see earlier options on another day?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, that might be good. What else have you got sooner in the week?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: The next available earlier slot is Wednesday, July 1st.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Wait, did

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: at 1 p.m. with Dewey Hauser.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Would you like to book that time?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, let’s go ahead and book that one, 1 p.m. on July 1st.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Alright,

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Your follow-up is set for Wednesday, July 1st at 1 p.m. with Dr. Dudi Hauser at Pivot Point Orthopedics.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Please bring your photo ID, insurance card, a list of your current medications, and any imaging gifts you have.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Is there anything else you need?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Got it,

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: No, I think that covers it. Thanks for your help.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: You're all set for your appointment.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Have a great day.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Alright

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Thanks, you too. Take care.
